# Faddeeva Reference Implementation

This directory contains Steven G. Johnson's upstream Faddeeva implementation:

- `Faddeeva.cc`
- `Faddeeva.hh`

The files are retained as an authoritative numerical reference and as the
provenance for the real `w_im` polynomial coefficients used by
`erfi_pytorch`. They are not compiled into the Python package.

Upstream project: <http://ab-initio.mit.edu/Faddeeva>
